Description.description: Official profitability metrics snapshots for reporting and audit. Distinct from live operational metrics. Ownership boundaries enforced. Now includes snapshot state governance (official, superseded, draft), enforcement of one official snapshot per relationship and as-of date, blocking of conflicting official snapshots, refresh logic to supersede prior snapshots, audit event emission for snapshot lifecycle, enforcement of snapshot-only queries for executive/manager reporting, diagnostics for missing, stale, or conflicting snapshots, and mandatory Snapshot State, Snapshot Freshness Timestamp, and As-Of Date for executive queries.
Value of the Fee Income YTD in base currency.
Unique identifier for entity instances
Value of the Total Deposits in base currency.
Value of the Total Loan Balance in base currency.
Value of the Total Loan Revenue in base currency.
Value of the Total Relationship Revenue in base currency.
Unique identifier of the user who created the record.
Date and time when the record was created.
Unique identifier of the delegate user who created the record.
Exchange rate for the currency associated with the entity with respect to the base currency.
Sequence number of the import that created this record.
Unique identifier of the user who modified the record.
Date and time when the record was modified.
Unique identifier of the delegate user who modified the record.
Date and time that the record was migrated.
Owner Id
Unique identifier for the business unit that owns the record
Unique identifier for the team that owns the record.
Unique identifier for the user that owns the record.
Status of the Profitability Snapshot
Status of the Profitability Snapshot
Reason for the status of the Profitability Snapshot
Reason for the status of the Profitability Snapshot
For internal use only.
Unique identifier of the currency associated with the entity.
Time zone code that was in use when the record was created.
